lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: When it comes to gold, most dwarves are short.

lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: Why? Am I in your way?

lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: Kiss me baby, one more time.

lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: The difference between a fairy and a fly is that fairies complain when you eat them.

lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: Don't ever pick a fight with a cactus, they have prickly tempers.

lines.speaker: Frog
lines.text: Oh how I long for my own lily-pad.
